decision_records.expected_effect: AG AG_DECOMPOSED_H003 should produce proposals that resolve wrong_aggregation: Remove the filter `t.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CD = USD` since the user asked for total payment amount in USD which likely refers to the column PAYMENT_AMT already being in USD (or at least the user wants all payments summed), not filtering to only USD currency records. Also remove the IS NOT NULL filters on FORM_OF_PAYMENT_CD and CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_VENDOR_CD as they exclude valid rows. The BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 29) AND CURRENT_DATE is also slightly different from >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) which could cause row differences. on 1 target qid(s).
decision_records.next_action: Emit proposals for AG
decision_records.root_cause: wrong_aggregation: Remove the filter `t.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CD = USD` since the user asked for total payment amount in USD which likely refers to the column PAYMENT_AMT already being in USD (or at least the user wants all payments summed), not filtering to only USD currency records. Also remove the IS NOT NULL filters on FORM_OF_PAYMENT_CD and CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_VENDOR_CD as they exclude valid rows.
